caseStudies.aboutClient: The African Confederation of Cooperative Savings and Credit Association (ACCOSCA) is a prominent Pan-African confederation comprising national savings and credit cooperative societies associations. The challenge lay in enhancing their website as an informative hub and resource centre for users seeking valuable information from ACCOSCA's platform.
caseStudies.businessImpact: The collaboration between Madavi and ACCOSCA led to a transformational digital platform that addressed user information needs and drove notable business outcomes. The significant improvements in website keyword rankings, enhanced user engagement metrics, and substantial initial traffic influx stand as testaments to the success of this partnership.
caseStudies.ourProcess:
The Madavi team tackled ACCOSCA's challenge by comprehensively revamping their website. The former site, while evolving, needed more functionality and user-friendliness, failing to align with the company's marketing direction. Additionally, ACCOSCA aimed to position itself as an industry thought leader by offering blogs, case studies, webinars, and videos showcasing its expanded product offerings.

During the project setup, our team collaborated closely with ACCOSCA to grasp their objectives and translate them into a user-focused website design. We crafted designs that highlighted ACCOSCA's product offerings and provided an intuitive user experience. A robust resources section was built, housing various content types and topics to cater to diverse user preferences.

results.label: Brand Positioning
results.value: A striking and functional new site that effectively positioned ACCOSCA as a clinical research software solution leader.

results.label: Keywords Rankings
results.value: Realized a remarkable 40% increase in website keyword rankings, enhancing ACCOSCA's online visibility and relevance.

results.label: User Engagement
results.value: Noted a substantial improvement in user engagement, with the average session duration increasing from 1.30 minutes to 5 minutes post-revamp.

results.label: Organic Traffic
results.value: Garnered an impressive 5,000 traffic count within ten days of the revamped site's launch, indicating heightened user interest and engagement.

caseStudies.aboutClient: The Rotaract Club of Nairobi Central, established in 1978 under Rotarian Mike Eldon, aims to foster leadership and professional development among its members while actively engaging in community service, promoting goodwill, fostering friendships, and advocating for international peace and understanding. Their challenge was to curate a repository showcasing club activities, promoting Rotary organization ideals, and creating awareness about upcoming events.
caseStudies.businessImpact:
The partnership's impact on RCNC was substantial:
Enhanced website user experience facilitated organic growth in new member prospects through search engine visibility.
Integration of an events calendar ensured members stayed updated on club activities and upcoming events.
Strategic editorial SEO elevated search engine rankings by identifying high-volume keywords and optimizing relevant website pages, boosting online visibility and engagement.
caseStudies.ourProcess: Our team  collaborated with RCNC to design and develop a website that effectively outlines club activities for members and the broader Rotary organization. The project entailed crafting a website that eloquently communicated the club's ethos while ensuring optimal accessibility across all devices.

results.label: Content Repository
results.value: Published 30 articles within two months, maintaining a consistent weekly update schedule and enriching the repository of information for the Rotaract Club of Nairobi Central.

results.label: Organic Traffic
results.value: Garnered 600 organic web visitors within the initial month, indicating heightened visibility and interest in the club's activities.

results.label: Engagement Time
results.value: Achieved an impressive average engagement time of 500 for visitor sessions, indicating substantial interest and interaction with the website's content.

caseStudies.aboutClient: Zumi Kenya, a thriving content hub in Nairobi, empowers millennial African women to embrace their best selves. Their challenge was to enhance the browsing experience for consumers while maintaining a high standard of quality content.
caseStudies.businessImpact:
The partnership's impact on Zumi Kenya was substantial:
Implementing content creation strategies resulted in higher rankings and stronger domain authority.
Technical SEO updates led to an almost immediate increase in organic search traffic, boosting Zumi Kenya's online visibility.
Enhanced website technical foundations aligned with keyword strategies, ensuring a more efficient and effective online presence.
caseStudies.ourProcess:
We  partnered with Zumi Kenya in 2019 to address their challenges. The primary focus was to improve organic traffic to their digital lifestyle and entertainment blog tailored for African women, https://www.zumi.co.ke/. Additionally, the website needed faster loading speeds, adversely impacting user experience and overall traffic. Our approach involved:

Conducting a comprehensive review of inbound and outbound links, identifying those with lower domain authority affecting the website.
Collaborating with in-house content creators to rewrite, copy and integrate new keywords to boost traffic.
Audit Zumi Kenya's website and resolve issues causing slow loading speeds, enhancing user experience.

results.label: Organic Traffic
results.value: Achieved an impressive 50% improvement in organic traffic within three months, signaling increased visibility and user engagement.

results.label: Loading Speeds
results.value: Witnessed a remarkable 4-second improvement in website loading speed, contributing to a smoother user experience and increased website traffic.

results.label: Domain Authority
results.value: Realized a substantial 55% improvement in Domain Authority within the same 3-month period, indicating enhanced credibility and recognition.

caseStudies.aboutClient: Nyingi Wanjiru Advocates is a Nairobi-based law firm revered for its extensive expertise in labour laws, administration, probate, and litigation. With a widespread presence nationwide, Nyingi Wanjiru Advocates aims to provide invaluable insights and top-notch representation to its clients.
caseStudies.ourProcess:
NW Advocates, a firm traditionally built on the strength of word-of-mouth referrals, recognized a critical gap: they lacked a digital presence for the modern client. They partnered with Madavi to bridge this divide, seeking a professional online identity that could effectively capture and convert the growing number of individuals seeking legal counsel online.

The Strategy & Execution
Our team undertook a comprehensive overhaul to transform their digital landscape:

Modern Web Design: We developed a sleek, contemporary website that serves as a digital storefront, encapsulating the firm’s core values and professional essence.

Strategic Organization: To enhance content delivery, we intuitively structured their diverse practice areas, making it easier for potential clients to find specific expertise.

Conversion-Focused Experience: By collaborating closely with the NW Advocates office, we ensured the user journey was seamless and aligned with their business objectives.

results.label: Traffic
results.value: 200% Improvement in Goal Completions

results.label: Conversions
results.value: 30% Increase in Website Conversions

results.label: Google SERPS
results.value: Significant Movement - 3000 positions up in Positive Google SERPs

caseStudies.aboutClient: Eyeroom Opticians, a boutique eyewear shop in Kenya, aimed to enhance its digital presence and address issues about online ordering. caseStudies.businessImpact:
The partnership between Madavi and Eyeroom Opticians resulted in impactful business outcomes:
Achieved a substantial 40% increase in website keyword rankings, amplifying Eyeroom Opticians' online visibility.
Realized an impressive 3000-position positive surge in Google Search Engine Results Pages (SERPs), significantly elevating the company's search presence.
Garnered an impressive 10,000 organic traffic count within 60 days of the revamped site's launch, showcasing heightened user interest and engagement.
caseStudies.ourProcess: We collaborated closely with Eyeroom Opticians to revamp their digital storefront, explicitly focusing on streamlining the ordering process and enhancing the overall user experience. Amid the urgency caused by increased traffic during the COVID-19 crisis, our team swiftly worked to create an engaging website and resolve cart abandonment issues.

results.label: Ecommerce Website

results.label: User Experience

caseStudies.aboutClient: Grounded Africa is a Kenyan-based social enterprise that produces non-toxic, biodegradable cleaning products made from locally sourced, plant-based ingredients. With a strong commitment to sustainability and safe living, Grounded caters to health-conscious households, schools, and businesses that care about clean spaces and a clean planet. Their products are people-safe, pet-safe, and planet-safe—offering a refreshing alternative to harsh chemical cleaners.
caseStudies.businessImpact:
The results were swift and impactful. The combination of fresh, high-quality product content and strategically targeted ads significantly increased website traffic and customer engagement. Grounded saw a marked improvement in online sales, with more customers discovering their products through optimized ad funnels and engaging visuals.
Our work helped position Grounded as a premium eco-cleaning brand with both beauty and substance—backed by results that delivered where it mattered most: sales growth and brand visibility.
caseStudies.ourProcess: While Grounded had a clear mission and a loyal customer base, they faced challenges in expanding their reach and increasing online sales. Website traffic was low, and their product content lacked the professional polish needed to drive conversions. Additionally, the brand hadn’t fully tapped into the power of digital advertising to grow awareness and scale e-commerce performance. They needed a marketing partner to help them attract the right audience, boost product visibility, and convert interest into sales.

results.label: Content Production
results.value: We led a professional product photoshoot that captured Grounded’s full range in a clean, vibrant, and lifestyle-oriented style—communicating the brand’s natural aesthetic and premium quality. These visuals were optimized for web and social media use.

results.label: Website Optimization for Traffic
results.value: We analyzed their existing site and optimized key landing pages with compelling visuals, improved SEO, and clear calls to action.

results.label: Targeted Ads Campaign
results.value: We launched paid ad campaigns across social media and Google Ads to attract new audiences. Using precise targeting and persuasive copy, we promoted specific products and bundles to drive clicks, add-to-carts, and conversions.

caseStudies.aboutClient:
Background – About the Client:
Clay & Associates is a boutique law firm based in Nairobi, Kenya. Known for its client-first approach and legal expertise across corporate, commercial, and litigation fields, the firm serves individuals, SMEs, and businesses seeking dependable legal counsel. Challenge:
Despite their strong legal reputation, Clay & Associates lacked an effective digital footprint. Their website ranked poorly on search engines, resulting in limited online inquiries and reduced visibility among prospective clients searching for legal services.
caseStudies.ourProcess:
Madavi implemented a targeted SEO strategy that involved:
Conducting a full technical SEO audit to identify performance gaps.
Optimizing key service pages with high-intent legal keywords relevant to the Kenyan market.
Updating meta data, improving internal linking, and adding structured data to boost search visibility.


Providing recommendations for content development aligned with search trends.

results.label: Traffic

results.value: Legal keyword rankings grew by 40%, resulting in better visibility in Google SERPs.

results.label: Domain Authority
results.value: Improved domain authority and increased average session duration, showing higher user trust and relevance.

caseStudies.aboutClient: Kenya Drylands Education Fund (KDEF) is a nonprofit organization working to improve education access and food security in the arid and semi-arid regions of Kenya. With a mission to empower marginalized communities through education, nutrition, and child protection programs, KDEF has become a vital force in supporting children and families in some of the most underserved parts of the country. Their work spans early childhood education, school feeding programs, and community development initiatives that promote long-term sustainability.
caseStudies.businessImpact:
The revamped website now serves as a dynamic, informative, and inspiring platform that truly represents KDEF’s work. Visitors can easily understand their mission, explore programs, and donate or get involved. The new brand guideline has equipped the KDEF team with the tools to maintain a cohesive visual identity, helping them communicate more effectively with stakeholders and amplify their impact.
Thanks to this transformation, KDEF now stands out with a digital presence that reflects the heart and professionalism of their mission — ready to grow their reach and deepen their impact in Kenya’s dryland communities.
caseStudies.ourProcess:
Despite its meaningful work on the ground, KDEF struggled with a digital identity that didn’t effectively communicate its impact or professionalism. Their website was outdated, lacking clarity, structure, and mobile responsiveness. There was also no formal brand guideline in place, resulting in inconsistent visuals and messaging across their materials. These gaps limited their ability to attract partners, engage donors, and present a strong, unified image to the public.
Madavi stepped in to revamp KDEF’s online and brand presence. We began by understanding their vision, values, and stakeholders through collaborative discovery sessions.

results.label: Website Redesign
results.value: We gave the website a modern, clean, and user-friendly look — with improved navigation, responsive design, and impactful storytelling to reflect KDEF’s mission and work on the ground.

results.label: Brand Guideline
results.value: We developed a comprehensive brand guide covering logo use, color palette, typography, tone of voice, and visual direction. This ensured that KDEF could maintain consistency across all communications, both online and offline.

results.label: Strengthened Messaging
results.value: We refined their core messaging to clearly articulate their programs and encourage action from supporters and potential partners.

caseStudies.aboutClient: Aurora Health Systems is a Kenya-based healthcare provider focused on delivering accessible and community-oriented health services. With a strong emphasis on quality care, the brand aimed to position itself as a modern, patient-centered institution. Aurora needed high-quality visual content to enhance brand visibility and better communicate their mission and services to the public. Their existing digital content lacked professionalism and consistency, limiting their impact across platforms.
caseStudies.ourProcess:

On-site filming at Aurora’s facilities to capture authentic healthcare interactions and the patient experience.

Development of a central brand video and shorter cuts optimized for web and social media distribution.

Post-production editing, subtitles, and brand-aligned visual direction to ensure consistent messaging across digital assets.

results.label: Brand Video
results.value: Delivered 1 flagship brand video and 4 short video clips for multi-channel use.

results.label: Brand Identity
results.value: Strengthened Aurora’s brand identity and visual consistency across its digital platforms.

results.label: Building Trust
results.value: Elevated trust and engagement from patients, partners, and community stakeholders.

caseStudies.aboutClient: iFunza is an AI-powered educational and financial technology platform based in Nairobi, Kenya, designed to connect students, parents, and schools. We were tasked with building Ifunza version : Designing an adaptive educational platform to enhance communications between parents and guardians
caseStudies.businessImpact: The product was shipped to early adopters(schools) who posted a significant improvement in student performance due to timely communication between teachers and parents who were able to implement decisions on time
caseStudies.ourProcess:
Madavi was approached to define the above problem rampant in the Kenyan educational ecosystem and how to come up with a solution for it. Our client, a parent with a child in school, needed help with working towards Proof of Concept and a Minimum Viable Product (M.V.P).

The Madavi team was able to design, structure and develop a product that answers the problem statement by coming up with a product that enhances teacher-parent communication through a web and mobile app.

results.label: Core Platform
results.value: We build the core platform with admin, schools and parents dashboards for the first 10 schools to test.

caseStudies.aboutClient: Tatu City is a 5,000-acre mixed-use Special Economic Zone (SEZ) located in Ruiru, Kiambu County, just on the outskirts of Nairobi, Kenya. It is designed as a "live-work-play" smart city intended to de-congest Nairobi by providing a decentralized urban environment.  We were tasked with developing a digital framework to automate Activity Management in Construction to Improve Efficiency
caseStudies.businessImpact: We worked with Tatu City for 6 months to understand the workflow and developed a system that would aid them in executing the same operations as before but at a faster effective rate. This increased projects done per a specified period of time. Collaboration between teams also improved since people could communicate via both web and mobile applications
caseStudies.ourProcess:
The road construction process is a rigorous set of activities that needs constant communication between collaborating teams. Work delegation and approval was done manually by sending relevant documents between individuals which increased the construction period. 

We designed a prototype that entailed all activities done at  a road construction site and iterated on it with the Engineers to  make it better. Their interactions were facilitated  through a mobile and web application.

results.label: Construction Management Software
results.value: We prototyped SAMS v1, a construction management software platform designed to connect every stakeholder in a construction project—from owners and general contractors to specialty contractors.

caseStudies.aboutClient: Kidani Mabati is a fast-growing roofing solutions provider in Kenya, specializing in high-quality mabati (iron sheets) for residential, commercial, and industrial use. With a commitment to durability, affordability, and customer satisfaction, Kidani Mabati has earned a solid reputation in the competitive construction sector. The company serves clients across the country, offering a wide range of mabati profiles, colors, and accessories tailored to various roofing needs.
caseStudies.businessImpact:
The revamped Kidani Mabati website now acts as both a digital showroom and a sales engine. The custom quote calculator has drastically improved user experience and lead conversion—empowering clients to make informed decisions and place orders from anywhere, at any time.
With this enhanced online presence, Kidani Mabati has positioned itself as a modern, customer-focused brand in the roofing space—ready to scale and serve with greater efficiency.
caseStudies.ourProcess:
While Kidani Mabati had a strong offline presence, their website lacked the functionality and modern appeal needed to serve today’s digital-first customers. The user interface was outdated, the content structure was unclear, and most critically, the site did not support direct product inquiries or quote requests. This made it difficult for potential buyers to engage with the brand online or place orders efficiently—resulting in missed opportunities and manual workload for the team.
Madavi collaborated with the Kidani Mabati team to deliver a full website transformation—focused not just on design, but on streamlining the customer journey.

results.label: Website Revamp
results.value: We redesigned the website with a clean, professional layout that clearly showcases their product range, company values, and service areas.

results.label: Custom Quote Calculator Integration
results.value: The centerpiece of the revamp was a tailor-made quote calculator built into the site. This feature allows customers to select product types, colors, sizes, and quantities—and get an instant cost estimate. It also enables direct order placement or quote requests through the platform.

results.label: User-Friendly Navigation
results.value: We organized content for easy browsing, helping visitors find products and information quickly, even on mobile.

results.label: Performance Optimization
results.value: The site was built for speed, mobile responsiveness, and SEO readiness—ensuring it’s as functional as it is beautiful.

caseStudies.aboutClient: The HealthTech Hub Africa (HTHA) is a pioneering healthtech accelerator based in Kigali, Rwanda, dedicated to driving the development of health technologies across Africa. Through collaboration with government partners and funders, HTHA aims to fast-track innovations into public health systems, particularly benefiting low-income and underserved populations.
caseStudies.ourProcess: HTHA sought to establish a robust online presence to facilitate collaboration between governments, startups, and scale-ups in the healthtech space, while also attracting funding and expertise.

results.label: Increased Engagement
results.value: The redesigned website led to a surge in engagement, evidenced by a 300% rise in goal completions.

results.label: Enhanced Visibility
results.value: Strategic SEO efforts propelled HTHA's website to a 2500-position jump in positive Google SERPs, expanding its reach and attracting a broader audience.

results.label: Improved Conversions
results.value: Optimized content and user journeys resulted in a 40% increase in website conversions, driving meaningful connections and partnerships within the healthtech community.

caseStudies.aboutClient: MMS Advocates, a forward-thinking law firm, specializes in providing reliable legal advisory and representation services tailored to their clients' needs. Their challenge was personalizing legal education for the masses using contemporary social interactive tools.
caseStudies.businessImpact:
The partnership's impact on MMS Advocates was significant:
Positioned MMS Advocates as a leading law firm in Kenya through robust technical and editorial SEO strategies that boosted search visibility and ranking.
Utilized Google Analytics to guide strategic marketing decisions, such as leveraging YouTube as a viable channel for driving qualified web traffic.
caseStudies.ourProcess:
Collaborating with Alan Mzungu, Managing Partner at MMS Advocates, we addressed this challenge by:
Shifting perceptions from a reactive approach ("You Need a Lawyer when in Trouble") to proactive legal advisory for day-to-day operations.
Designing a web strategy and crafting a 15-month content plan aligned with trends and online search behaviour, facilitating effective communication with potential clients.
Employing advanced analytics to monitor progress and generate comprehensive evaluation reports.

results.label: Organic Traffic
results.value: Achieved  3000% website traffic growth year-on-year since 2019, demonstrating a significant increase in online visibility and engagement.

results.label: Leads
results.value: Generated an average of 100 leads monthly, reflecting heightened interest and engagement with MMS Advocates' legal services.

results.label: Leads Engagement
results.value: Realized an impressive 80% return traffic month-on-month, indicating sustained user interest and retention.

caseStudies.aboutClient: Fine Urban Interiors is a premium interior design and architectural firm based in Nairobi, Kenya, known for transforming spaces into luxurious, functional, and aesthetically bold environments. With a portfolio that spans high-end residential, commercial, and hospitality projects, Fine Urban Interiors has carved a niche as a go-to firm for modern African luxury. Their work merges global design trends with local creativity, delivering standout results for a discerning clientele.
caseStudies.businessImpact:
Although Fine Urban Interiors had built a strong reputation offline and through social media, their website was not living up to their brand’s elegance and quality. The previous site lacked structure, visual consistency, and didn’t offer a seamless user experience. It failed to showcase the depth of their portfolio or communicate the brand’s premium positioning effectively — limiting its potential to convert site visitors into clients or collaborators.

The final product is a visually stunning, high-performance website that matches the sophistication of Fine Urban Interiors’ brand. The new site not only elevates their digital presence but also serves as a strategic business tool — helping them attract high-end clients and collaborators across the region and beyond.
With a more immersive and professional online experience, Fine Urban Interiors is now better positioned to scale its impact and showcase its creativity to a global audience.
caseStudies.ourProcess: Madavi partnered with Fine Urban Interiors to bring their digital home up to the standard of their physical spaces. Our team worked closely with the client to understand their brand essence, target audience, and long-term goals.

results.label: Website Revamp
results.value: We completely redesigned the website to reflect the premium and polished image of the brand. The new design is clean, image-driven, and optimized for mobile — with smooth navigation and a sleek interface.

results.label: Portfolio Highlights
results.value: We placed special focus on their project galleries, allowing users to visually experience their work through high-quality imagery and well-structured case studies.

results.label: SEO and Performance
results.value: The site was optimized for speed, search engine performance, and user engagement — turning it into a tool for both brand visibility and client acquisition.

results.label: Enhanced UX/UI
results.value: We created a more intuitive user flow to encourage exploration and make it easy for potential clients to reach out or book consultations.
